entities.name: Non-GAAP presentation dispute (Table 4 / Comment 1) - Reg G / C&DI 102.10

attributes.subject: Non-GAAP financial measures presentation; alleged inclusion of GAAP-style line items and subtotals plus a gross profit measure not in Form 10-Q
attributes.regulation: C&DIs for Non-GAAP Financial Measures Question 102.10(a) and (c)
attributes.staff_position: Remove this presentation from future filings or explain compliance with Question 102.10(a) and (c)
attributes.company_position: Will include gross profit in GAAP Consolidated Statements of Income in future 10-Qs and 10-Ks; will revise Table 4 to present each non-GAAP reconciliation separately

entities.context: the updated presentation continues to include most of the line items and subtotals found in your GAAP income statement and adds a measure of gross profit not found in your Form 10-Q. As previously requested, please remove this presentation from future filings or alternatively explain to us in detail how this presentation complies with the guidance in Question 102.10(a) and (c)

entities.name: Spin-related costs disclosure (Comment 5)

attributes.subject: Description and quantification of spin-related and manufacturing network costs in earnings release footnotes
attributes.company_position: Will provide further description and quantification of the spin-related and manufacturing network costs within the footnotes of our earnings releases

entities.context: As previously discussed in our response dated May 14, 2024 to Comment 5, the Company will provide a further description and quantification of the spin-related and manufacturing network costs within the footnotes of our earnings releases.

entities.name: Merck & Co., Inc.
entities.context: Spin-related costs include costs from the separation of Merck & Co., Inc., Rahway, NJ, US.

relations.target_entity: Non-GAAP presentation dispute (Table 4 / Comment 1) - Reg G / C&DI 102.10
relations.evidence: RESPONSE TO COMMENT 1: The Company respectfully acknowledges the Staff's comment. The Company intends to include a measure of gross profit in the GAAP Consolidated Statements of Income

As previously discussed in our response dated May 14, 2024 to Comment 5, the Company will provide a further description and quantification of the spin-related and manufacturing network costs within the footnotes of our earnings releases.
